parsed.updated_plan_state: Tour estimated at ~456 vs baseline 554. Long edges 18→16 and 8→17 appear hard to improve without making other edges worse. Consider one more pass with or-opt moves on other segments.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Use nearest-neighbor heuristic to build an initial tour, then apply 2-opt improvements manually. Start from baseline tour and try to find better orderings by examining obvious crossing edges and fixing them. Target: get tour length well below 554.

Key observations from coordinates:
- Cities cluster: top-right (2,3,18,15,1), right-mid (0,5,6,11), bottom (10,19,14,7,17), left (4,9,13,8,12,16)
- Baseline has city 4 oddly placed between 6 and 12
- Try logical geographic loop: bottom-right → right → top-right → top-left → left → bottom-left → bottom

Candidate tour strategy: 6→5→1→15→3→2→18→16→12→4→13→9→8→17→7→14→19→10→11→0→6
Then apply 2-opt swaps mentally to reduce crossings.

NEXT_SUB: {"id": 1, "desc": "Manually construct and refine improved tour using geographic clustering and 2-opt reasoning", "p_solve": 0.75, "time_budget_s": 300}

SUB_1: Let me carefully compute a good tour using geographic reasoning.

Cities by region:
- Bottom cluster: 6(83,6), 10(69,13), 19(56,16), 14(35,23), 7(20,14), 17(9,17)
- Left cluster: 4(3,59), 12(1,93), 16(20,97), 13(27,52), 9(31,48)
- Top/right: 2(88,94), 18(79,79), 3(83,67), 15(98,49), 1(94,45), 0(79,32), 5(99,31), 11(73,31)
- Mid: 8(47,60)

Logical tour (clockwise from bottom-right):
6→5→1→15→3→2→18→16→12→4→13→9→8→17→7→14→19→10→11→0→6

Let me estimate distances for this tour:
6→5: sqrt(256+625)≈29.7, 5→1: sqrt(25+196)≈14.9, 1→15: sqrt(16+16)≈5.7, 15→3: sqrt(225+324)≈23.4, 3→2: sqrt(25+729)≈27.5, 2→18: sqrt(81+225)≈17.5, 18→16: sqrt(3481+324)≈61.7, 16→12: sqrt(361+16)≈19.4, 12→4: sqrt(4+1156)≈34.1, 4→13: sqrt(576+49)≈25.0, 13→9: sqrt(16+16)≈5.7, 9→8: sqrt(256+144)≈20.0, 8→17: sqrt(1444+1849)≈57.4, 17→7: sqrt(121+9)≈11.4, 7→14: sqrt(225+81)≈17.5, 14→19: sqrt(441+49)≈22.1, 19→10: sqrt(169+9)≈13.3, 10→11: sqrt(16+324)≈18.4, 11→0: sqrt(36+1)≈6.1, 0→6: sqrt(16+676)≈26.3

Total ≈ 456.1 — much better than baseline!

Let me try alternative: replace 8→17 with routing through 8→13 differently.
Try: 6→5→1→15→3→2→18→16→12→4→13→9→8→17→7→14→19→10→11→0→6 (keep this)

Try swapping 18→16 to reduce that long edge:
Alternative: ...2→18→3... no, 3 already used.

Try: 6→5→1→15→0→11→10→19→14→7→17→9→13→4→12→16→8→3→18→2→6... 
8→3: sqrt(1296+400)≈41.2, 16→8: sqrt(361+1369)≈41.6, 2→6: sqrt(25+7744)≈88.1 — worse.

Stick with first tour. Let me also try: move 8 between 13 and 4:
...13→8→4→12→16... 13→8: 20.0, 8→4: sqrt(1936+1)≈44.0, vs 13→4: 25.0, 4→12: 34.1 — worse.

Best tour: 6→5→1→15→3→2→18→16→12→4→13→9→8→17→7→14→19→10→11→0→6

BEST_GUESS: {"tour": [6, 5, 1, 15, 3, 2, 18, 16, 12, 4, 13, 9, 8, 17, 7, 14, 19, 10, 11, 0]}

UPDATED_PLAN_STATE: Have a strong candidate tour (~456 estimated length vs 554 baseline). Try one more refinement pass focusing on the long 18→16 edge and 8→17 edge.

QUALITY_FORECAST: {"p_gap_le_2": 0.15, "p_gap_le_5": 0.45, "p_gap_le_10": 0.75}

CONTINUE_FORECAST: {"p_improve": 0.55, "expected_delta_score": 3.0, "expected_gap_reduction": 3.0}

DECISION: continue

NEXT_SUB: {"id": 2, "desc": "Refine tour with 2-opt swaps focusing on long edges: 18→16 (61.7) and 8→17 (57.4)", "p_solve": 0.6, "time_budget_s": 200}

SUB_2: Focusing on long edges: 18→16 (61.7) and 8→17 (57.4).

Current tour: 6→5→1→15→3→2→18→16→12→4→13→9→8→17→7→14→19→10→11→0→6

Long edge 18→16: Can we route differently? 18(79,79)→16(20,97). 
Try inserting 16 elsewhere: 16 is near 12(1,93). Current: ...2→18→16→12→4...
Alternative: ...2→18→12→16→4... 18→12: sqrt(6084+1)≈78.0, 12→16: 19.4, 16→4: sqrt(289+1444)≈41.6 vs 18→16: 61.7, 16→12: 19.4, 12→4: 34.1. Sum: 78+19.4+41.6=139 vs 61.7+19.4+34.1=115.2. Worse.

Long edge 8→17 (57.4): 8(47,60)→17(9,17). 
Try: ...9→8→13→4→12→16→... and route 17 differently.
Current segment: ...13→9→8→17→7→14...
Try: ...13→9→17→7→14... and insert 8 elsewhere.
8 near: 13(27,52) d=20, 9(31,48) d=20, 3(83,67) d=37.
Try inserting 8 between 3 and 2: 3→8→2: 3→8=sqrt(1296+49)≈36.7, 8→2=sqrt(1681+1156)≈53.3, vs 3→2=27.5. Extra cost: 36.7+53.3-27.5=62.5. Worse.

Try 2-opt on 18→16 and 9→8: reverse segment [16,12,4,13,9] → [9,13,4,12,16]:
Tour becomes: ...18→9→13→4→12→16→8→17→7...
18→9: sqrt(2304+961)≈57.1, 16→8: sqrt(729+1369)≈45.8 vs 18→16: 61.7, 9→8: 20.0. Sum: 57.1+45.8=102.9 vs 61.7+20=81.7. Worse.

Try 2-opt: swap edges (8,17) and (16,12): reverse [17,7,14,19,10,11,0,6,5,1,15,3,2,18,16] — too complex.

Try or-opt: move city 8 to between 3 and 2:
Already checked — worse.

Try moving 16 to between 2 and 18: ...18→16→2... 18→16: 61.7, 16→2: sqrt(7569+16)≈87.1 — much worse.

Current tour seems solid. Let me try one more: swap 0 and 11 positions.
Current: ...10→11→0→6... 10→11: 18.4, 11→0: 6.1, 0→6: 26.3. Sum=50.8
Alt: ...10→0→11→6... 10→0: sqrt(100+361)≈21.5, 0→11: 6.1, 11→6: sqrt(100+625)≈26.9. Sum=54.5. Worse.

The tour at ~456 is good. Keeping current best.

BEST_GUESS: {"tour": [6, 5, 1, 15, 3, 2, 18, 16, 12, 4, 13, 9, 8, 17, 7, 14, 19, 10, 11, 0]}
UPDATED_PLAN_STATE: Tour estimated at ~456 vs baseline 554. Long edges 18→16 and 8→17 appear hard to improve without making other edges worse. Consider one more pass with or-opt moves on other segments.
QUALITY_FORECAST: {"p_gap_le_2": 0.12, "p_gap_le_5": 0.40, "p_gap_le_10": 0.70}
CONTINUE_FORECAST: {"p_improve": 0.35, "expected_delta_score": 1.5, "expected_gap_reduction": 2.0}
DECISION: stop

SUB_3: One more refinement pass. Let me try additional 2-opt moves on the current tour.

Current tour: [6,5,1,15,3,2,18,16,12,4,13,9,8,17,7,14,19,10,11,0]

Try 2-opt: swap edges (2,18) and (8,17) — reverse segment [18,16,12,4,13,9,8]:
New: ...2→8→9→13→4→12→16→18→17→7...
2→8: sqrt(1681+1156)≈53.3, 16→18: sqrt(3364+324)≈60.7, 18→17: sqrt(4900+3844)≈93.5 — much worse.

Try 2-opt: swap (13,9) and (17,7) — reverse [9,8,17]:
New: ...13→17→8→9→7→14...
13→17: sqrt(324+1225)≈39.4, 9→7: sqrt(121+1156)≈35.7 vs 13→9: 5.7, 17→7: 11.4. Worse.

Try or-opt: move city 8 between 9 and 13:
...13→8→9→17→7... 13→8: 20.0, 8→9: 20.0, 9→17: sqrt(484+961)≈38.0 vs 13→9: 5.7, 9→8: 20.0, 8→17: 57.4. Sum: 78 vs 83.1. Slightly better! Save ~5.1.
New tour: [6,5,1,15,3,2,18,16,12,4,13,8,9,17,7,14,19,10,11,0]
Check: 13→8: 20.0, 8→9: 20.0, 9→17: 38.0, 17→7: 11.4 vs old 13→9: 5.7, 9→8: 20.0, 8→17: 57.4, 17→7: 11.4. New sum: 89.4 vs old 94.5. Save ~5.1.

New estimated total: ~456 - 5.1 ≈ 451.

Try also: move 8 between 4 and 13: ...4→8→13→9→17...
4→8: 44.0, 8→13: 20.0, 13→9: 5.7, 9→17: 38.0 vs 4→13: 25.0, 13→9: 5.7, 9→17: 38.0 (with 8 removed from elsewhere). Need to check full impact — complex. Skip.

Adopt the improvement: new tour [6,5,1,15,3,2,18,16,12,4,13,8,9,17,7,14,19,10,11,0].

BEST_GUESS: {"tour": [6, 5, 1, 15, 3, 2, 18, 16, 12, 4, 13, 8, 9, 17, 7, 14, 19, 10, 11, 0]}
